summary.summary: Update in Config.xcconfig: APP_DEV_VERSION was incremented from 0.8.4.6 to 0.8.4.7 (diff:852cd63dee7b, file:85815ffdef47). Commit message indicates this is a CI/dev version bump (commit:3f36530db767).
